name: [GRV-API] Deployment Performance Regression Monitor
message:
Performance regression detected in recent deployment.

Current Version: {{version}}
Current P95 Latency: {{trace.django.request.duration.p95}}ms
Baseline P95 Latency: {{#divide trace.django.request.duration.p95 value}}{{.}}ms{{/divide}}
Regression Factor: {{value}}x
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Performance Regression Impact:
- User experience significantly degraded
- May indicate inefficient code changes
- Potential resource contention issues

Investigation Steps:
1. Review recent code changes in version {{version}}
2. Check database query performance
3. Analyze external API dependencies
4. Review infrastructure resource usage
5. Consider performance optimization or rollback

Performance Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api?env=prod&view=performance

options.escalation_message: Performance regression persists. Consider rollback or immediate optimization.
